subcodes.first_line: O thou namesake of the Sacrifice! Self-sacrifice is thy task, and to hasten unto the altar of love befitteth thee, that thou mayest become the manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی ذبیح جانفشانی کار تست و شتافتن بقربانگاه عشق سزاوار تو تا مظهر و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @prayer for sacrifice, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @suffering and imprisonment, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @pain of love; love as veil
